title: Phoenix Armor restores killed equipped creature to half HP

card.rawText: The equipped creature receives 10 damage at the beginning of their turns. If the equipped creature is killed, send this card to the cemetery and restore equipped creature's HP to 50%.

plan.title: Phoenix Armor restores killed equipped creature to half HP
plan.summary: If the equipped creature is killed, verify Phoenix Armor goes to cemetery and restores the creature to 50% HP.

notes: Pre-place Phoenix Armor on field magic slot attached to player_1 primary creature.
The equipped creature receives 10 damage at the beginning of their turns. If the equipped creature is killed, send this card to the cemetery and restore equipped creature's HP to 50%.

steps: Mark the equipped creature as killed.
manualVerification: Verify against card text: The equipped creature receives 10 damage at the beginning of their turns. If the equipped creature is killed, send this card to the cemetery and restore equipped creature's HP to 50%.
riskNotes: A red result marks missing or incomplete runtime support for this rules text.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_081_phoenix_armor-081-e02 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
